name: BridgeBio Pharma, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview A New Type of Biopharmaceutical Company BridgeBio Pharma, Inc. is a commercial-stage, multi-product biopharmaceutical company organized around a portfolio operating model to discover, develop, and deliver medicines for patients with genetic diseases. We seek to translate advances in genetic science into therapies for patient populations with significant unmet medical needs.
